use_cases: Two-factor authentication in login flows for enhanced account security
Phone or email verification during account registration processes
Payment confirmation codes for secure transaction completion
One-time access codes for password reset workflows
Verification tokens for sensitive document or account actions
ai_summary: A 6-digit OTP input component with full keyboard navigation (arrow keys, backspace, auto-focus), paste support with clipboard integration, and dark/light mode toggle. Features automatic completion detection, individual digit input validation, and seamless navigation between input fields. Provides visual feedback through icons for paste detection and completion states.
